witness_1_caught_class.note: Caught by _green_without_red: a 2nd commit flipped test_a failed->passed with no code change (vacuous green). git history shipped as git-history.bundle; named_check clones it and runs the real detector.

witness_2_caught_other.note: Caught by _entry_dropped: a 2nd commit dropped the test_a entry (no flip marker). Survives the surgical weakening of the class-predicate anchor. git history shipped as git-history.bundle.

witness_3_clean.note: Clean: a single honest baseline commit (both tests red). The real detector has nothing to compare -> []. git history shipped as git-history.bundle.
